name: io.argoproj.workflow.v1alpha1.CronWorkflowStatus
description: CronWorkflowStatus is the status of a CronWorkflow

active.description: Active is a list of active workflows stemming from this CronWorkflow

conditions.description: Conditions is a list of conditions the CronWorkflow may have

failed.description: v3.6 and after: Failed counts how many times child workflows failed

lastScheduledTime.description: LastScheduleTime is the last time the CronWorkflow was scheduled

phase.description: v3.6 and after: Phase is an enum of Active or Stopped. It changes to Stopped when stopStrategy.expression is true

succeeded.description: v3.6 and after: Succeeded counts how many times child workflows succeeded
